mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ITEM ( ITEM_ID, ITEM_NAME, PRICE, DESCRIPTION, PICTURE_URL, PREVIEW_URL ) VALUES ( ITEM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{itemName}, #{price}, #{description}, #{pictureUrl}, #{previewUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_ID, ITEM_NAME, PRICE, DESCRIPTION, PICTURE_URL, PREVIEW_URL FROM ITEM WHERE ITEM_ID > 0 ORDER BY ITEM_ID DESC
SELECT ITEM_ID, ITEM_NAME, PRICE, DESCRIPTION, PICTURE_URL, PREVIEW_URL FROM ITEM WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ITEM SET ITEM_NAME = #{itemName}, PRICE = #{price}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, PICTURE_URL = #{pictureUrl}, PREVIEW_URL = #{previewUrl} WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId}
